nasb.text: “Oholah played the harlot while she was Mine; and she lusted after her lovers, after the Assyrians, her neighbors,

esv.text: “Oholah played the whore while she was mine, and she lusted after her lovers the Assyrians, warriors

cnv.text: “阿荷拉嫁了我以後仍行邪淫，戀慕她的愛人，就是亞述的戰士。

ccb.text: “阿荷拉归属我后仍然淫乱，贪恋她的情人——亚述人。
